protein_name: Type I collagen is a member of group I collagen (fibrillar forming collagen). Belongs to the fibrillar collagen family. Forms the fibrils of tendon, ligaments and bones. In bones the fibrils are mineralized with calcium hydroxyapatite. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
